scripts.typecheck: tsc -b apps/tui apps/cli packages/contracts packages/client packages/ui-model packages/runtime packages/session packages/config packages/tools packages/pty packages/sandbox packages/skills packages/workflow packages/transport packages/mcp packages/sdk packages/testing packages/subagent
scripts.test: npx bun test packages/config/test/*.test.ts packages/runtime/test/*.test.ts packages/session/test/*.test.ts packages/ui-model/test/*.test.ts packages/client/test/*.test.ts packages/tools/test/*.test.ts packages/pty/test/*.test.ts packages/sandbox/test/*.test.ts packages/skills/test/*.test.ts packages/workflow/test/*.test.ts packages/transport/test/*.test.ts packages/mcp/test/*.test.ts packages/sdk/test/*.test.ts packages/subagent/test/*.test.ts --timeout 60000 && npm --workspace @natalia/tui run test
scripts.verify: npm run format && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run guard:imports
